---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability, a change to an existing one, or a UX improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem
<!-- What need isn't being met today? Who feels the pain (clinical
     reviewer, biomarker developer, trial sponsor, external collaborator)
     and what are they trying to accomplish? Lead with the use case,
     not the solution. -->

## The proposed solution
<!-- What should the app do differently? Sketch the ideal workflow from
     the user's side. UI mockups welcome; CLI snippets welcome; API
     request/response examples welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other ways this could be solved and why they fall short. Even a short
     bullet list helps reviewers understand the design space. -->

-
-

## Impact on existing behavior
<!-- Does this change break any existing output shape (CSV header, JSON
     payload, SVG annotation)? Does it move or rename an API route?
     Does it affect provenance stamping? If yes, note here. -->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- Concrete checkboxes that would close this issue. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional context
<!-- Links to related issues / PRs, papers, screenshots of similar UI
     elsewhere, anything else that informs the design. -->
